description_long: This rifle features a streamlined, modern design with a predominantly dark green body and a matte metallic barrel. The stock is integrated into the main body, giving it a compact, bullpup configuration, which positions the magazine and action behind the trigger for a shorter overall length. The grip and trigger assembly are black, contrasting with the green body, and the rifle includes a forward handguard for stability. The barrel is long and cylindrical, extending from the front of the body, and appears to be made of metal. There are no visible external sights or optics mounted on the top rail, and the magazine is not externally visible, suggesting it may be internal or not modeled. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, bullpup-style rifle with a dark green body, black grip, and a long metallic barrel. The design is modern and streamlined, lacking visible sights or an external magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the green body, black grip, and extended metallic barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the barrel and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the bullpup configuration and the black grip.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel with the body.
